message:
feat(extensions-js): deduplicate width-change renders and add reflow test

Fix custom UI poll handler to only set needsRender when the width
actually changes, avoiding redundant reflows on repeated polls that
report the same terminal width.

- handlePollResponse now compares nextWidth against current renderWidth
  before assigning, and only sets needsRender = true on actual change

Adds pijs_custom_ui_width_updates_trigger_reflow integration test
verifying that:
- Initial render fires at the configured width
- A width-change poll triggers a re-render at the new width
- The onDone callback correctly terminates the custom UI session

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
